title: Kraft Wrapping Paper Tape - Packing Tape for Gift Boxes - Recyclable, Strong Brown Tape for Cardboard Boxes - (3 Pack)
features: pack of 3 rolls - REALLY EASY TO USE AND TO TEAR. REALLY EASY TO FIND THE END and pull it up, as it doesn't rip all over the place like plastic ones do when you try to find the edge. NO NEED TO PEEL IT AWAY for recycling.

FOR THE PERFECT ECO-FRIENDLY GIFT: This strong packing tape roll is 37.5mm wide; it looks nicer on medium and small boxes. The snowflakes motif printed in water-based ink decorates beautifully any kraft paper gift box or recycled brown kraft wrapping paper. It makes your eco friendly presents look much nicer!

JAZZ UP YOUR BOXES: These heavy-duty Kraft paper tape rolls are everything you need to seal, secure and decorate any box, parcel, package or present. They jazz up boring old Kraft boxes for shipping, gifting or crafting. So you can SAVE on expensive wrapping paper that goes straight into the bin.

PROFESSIONAL-GRADE: At Merry Movers, we only use premium-quality heavy-duty tape that has been made in the UK. Our eco tape is exceptionally robust and reliable, which means you won't need to worry about peeling, tears, spills or breakages - ever.

USED BY BUSINESSES: These strong packing tapes are used by businesses across the UK for shipping their goods to clients. They can, therefore, be used as box tape, as parcel tape, as tape for packing boxes for mailing, posting, postal boxes, etc.

KIND TO THE PLANET: These Kraft paper tapes are 100% recyclable and completely plastic free, including the packaging. I love them! Why would anyone want to use plastic tapes ever again when you have high quality kraft paper tape for packaging and wrapping. Great eco alternative to single use plastic brown packing tape.

SUSTAINABLE: Our self-adhesive eco packing tape comes in 100% recyclable packaging and is made entirely from paper and cardboard. This makes it the perfect choice for anyone looking for a natural, eco-friendly and plastic-free alternative to traditional packaging supplies.
MADE IN THE UK: This means that the carbon footprint is negligible. They are produced in conformity with the strictest UK and EU regulations. And you can rest assured they are ethically manufactured.

PERFECT for any celebration, event or occasion. It jazzes up boring old Kraft boxes for shipping, Birthday's, Christmas/Xmas, Valentine's Day, Thanksgiving, Halloween, Hanukkah, Christening, Easter, Mother's Day, Father's Day, Wedding, Graduation, Bar Mitzvahs, Baby Shower etc.

100% SATISFACTION GUARANTEE: At Merry Movers, we're confident you'll love our beautiful and eco-friendly products just as much as we do. These products were designed to be strong and jazzy, to seal and decorate your brown parcels and gift boxes. We're confident you'll find they do exactly that. However, if you are not completely satisfied with your experience, we'll do everything we can to make it right.
description: Christmas Strong Brown Parcel Tape - 100% recyclable tapes This strong packing tape is made of unbleached Kraft paper. Each roll is 37.5mm wide and 50m long. The core is made of cardboard. The printed decoration is made with water-based ink. The white bag it is shipped in, is glassine, i.e. biodegradable and recyclable …And we reduced all packaging and literature to the bare minimum. Do you think that eco-friendly products are boring and rough! Not anymore! If you want to be kind to the planet without taking the joy out of life, this range of products is for YOU. If you have not seen it yet, have a look at our ‘Happy Birthday’, ‘Union Jack’, ‘Hearts’ or ‘Polka Dot’ Tapes too. This brown paper tape can easily replace the single-use plastic brown packing tape in most applications AND it is highly decorative. The evergreen design gives a touch of rustic sophistication to your presents or packages. Are you a small business? Looking for strength & rustic sophistication? In need of a strong tape for packing your boxes? This paper parcel tape is ideal for sealing cardboard boxes and brown parcel paper. Perfect if you want to give extra protection to your heavy parcels. It is narrower than normal packing tape, therefore it looks nice on small/medium size boxes. This makes your shipments and deliveries look like personal presents. All you need is to add the sticker with your logo and it will look really pretty and thoughtful. Are you concerned about the future of our planet? This range of self adhesive paper tapes is responsibly sourced and sustainable: Made from FSC sourced Kraft paper and recycled cardboard core - 100% recyclable. It would be home compostable if it wasn’t for the adhesive. It is definitely biodegradable.
